item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.2","is_repeated_local_repair":true,"same_means_type":true,"prior_repair_count":3,"is_n_plus_1_request":true,"is_bounded_emergency_exception_request":false,"emergency_constraint_present":true,"repeated_bypass_unresolved":true,"post_exception_closure_required":false,"pressure_present":true,"confidence":0.96,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"灯架编号漏记，交接单加过一行"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"无线话筒电池状态不清，又加过一行"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"升降台限位记录缺失，也加过一行"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"请在交接单里再加一行记录线缆保护套磨损"},{"role":"assistant","turn_index":1,"span":"拒绝把“线缆保护套磨损”继续作为交接单上的下一次局部补行处理"},{"role":"user","turn_index":2,"span":"货车已经到门口，今晚不把这一行写进去就不让卸货"},{"role":"user","turn_index":2,"span":"别讲清单重构，直接告诉我这一行怎么落"}],"abstain_reason":""}
